title: What Our Clients Say
description: Organizations and startups trust Threemates to deliver reliable software solutions that drive their business forward.

cards.text: Threemates built our school ERP from scratch and delivered exactly what we needed. The system handles admissions, attendance, and fee management seamlessly.
cards.name: Principal, EduCore Schools

cards.text: Their team understood our hospital workflows and built a management system that improved our patient record handling and billing processes significantly.
cards.name: Admin, MedLink Hospitals

cards.text: The SaaS dashboard they built for us is scalable, fast, and our customers love using it. Great technical team with clear communication throughout.
cards.name: CTO, NovaTech Startups

cards.text: We needed a custom inventory system and Threemates delivered it on time with all the features we asked for. Their support after launch has been excellent.
cards.name: Manager, Urban Retail Group

highlight.text: Threemates transformed our academic operations with a comprehensive college ERP. The student portal, grading system, and admin dashboard are exactly what our institution needed.
highlight.name: Director, SmartCampus Colleges
